title: rubus warrenii
intro: Rubus warrenii, also known as Warren's raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to eastern Australia, characterized by its edible fruits and fragrant foliage. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus warrenii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Rubus warrenii can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its fruits can be consumed fresh or used in jams and preserves.
